title: Rivelin Valley Studios
text:
Based in Sheffield’s Rivelin Valley.

This started as a way to get out more, ride, and see what’s around me.

Most of it isn’t obvious. It’s the quieter spots, the edges of the city, old industrial areas, roads that don’t lead anywhere in particular. Places people usually ignore.

I ride out, find something interesting, and try to turn it into a photograph.

That’s pretty much it.

Starting around Sheffield, but the plan is to go further over time.
